title: Showrunner Brand Configuration
description: Configuration schema for a brand's video production pipeline settings. One file per brand, stored at board-cron/[brand]-brand-config.json.

brand.description: Internal brand identifier (slug). Used to construct config file name.

displayName.description: Human-readable brand name, used in video titles and descriptions.

voiceCastFile.description: Relative path to the rotation-state.json file containing the voice cast for this brand.

visualTheme.description: Remotion visual theme identifier. Maps to a theme configuration in board-cron/remotion/src/themes/.

titleTemplate.description: YouTube title template. Supports variables: {topic}, {episode_number}, {brand}. Defaults to '{brand} Board | {topic} | EP{episode_number}'.

playlist.description: YouTube playlist name to add videos to. Playlist must already exist.

playlistId.description: YouTube playlist ID (starts with PL). Populated after first run if playlist exists.

linkedin.description: LinkedIn company page publishing config. Omit to skip LinkedIn.

hashtags.description: Hashtags to append to LinkedIn posts (without # prefix).

twitter.description: Twitter/X account config. Omit to skip Twitter. Requires TWITTER_API_KEY env var.

maxThreadLength.description: Maximum number of tweets in a thread. Default: 5.

scriptDir.description: Relative path to the directory containing script JSON files.

outputDir.description: Relative path to the root directory for video asset output.

logsDir.description: Relative path to the directory for production and QA log files.

remotion.description: Remotion render configuration overrides. All fields optional.

compositionId.description: Long-form Remotion composition ID. Default: BoardSession.

shortCompositionId.description: Short-form Remotion composition ID. Default: BoardSessionShort.

thumbnailCompositionId.description: Thumbnail Remotion still composition ID. Default: BoardSessionThumbnail.

codec.description: Video codec for rendering. Default: h264.

crf.description: Constant Rate Factor for h264/h265. Lower = higher quality. Default: 18.

qa.description: QA gate thresholds. Override defaults per brand.

audioLufsMin.description: Minimum acceptable LUFS for voice audio. Default: -14.

audioLufsMax.description: Maximum acceptable LUFS for voice audio. Default: -10.

longFormMinSeconds.description: Minimum duration in seconds for long-form video. Default: 480 (8 min).

longFormMaxSeconds.description: Maximum duration in seconds for long-form video. Default: 900 (15 min).

shortFormMinSeconds.description: Minimum duration in seconds for short-form video. Default: 45.

shortFormMaxSeconds.description: Maximum duration in seconds for short-form video. Default: 90.

minTextSizePx.description: Minimum font size in pixels for readability gate. Default: 24.

defaultTags.description: Default tags to apply to all videos for this brand.

defaultLanguage.description: BCP-47 language code for video language. Default: en-AU.

descriptionTemplateFile.description: Relative path to the Markdown template for YouTube descriptions.
